The book was read by Sara. Frogs are small. Mike is a bird. If X1 is a father of Y1 and Y1 is a father of Z1, X1 is a grandfather of Z1. Sheep are afraid of mice. Nile's length is 80 kilometers. The woman holding a lamp sang. Clinton defeated Dole. Emily is a cat. The letter was written in June. The guide offered the tourists tea. The picture was painted by Leo. John does not fly?
